<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Interactive School Portfolio</title>

<style>

/* GLOBAL */

*{
box-sizing:border-box;
}

body{
margin:0;
font-family:Felix Titling;
background:#281C59;
color:white;
text-align:center;
}

p{
font-family:Consolas;
color:white;
}

/* HEADER */

.main-header{
background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00c6ff,#0072ff);
padding:25px;
box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

.main-header h1{
margin:0;
font-size:32px;
}

.main-header p{
margin-top:5px;
opacity:0.9;
}

/* PAGE */

.page{
display:none;
padding:40px 20px;
animation:fade .6s;
}

.active{
display:block;
}

@keyframes fade{
from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}
to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
}

/* HOME LAYOUT */

.home-flex{
display:flex;
justify-content:center;
align-items:center;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:40px;
}

.home-flex img{
width:300px;
border-radius:20px;
box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}

/* SECTIONS */

.section{
background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
padding:25px;
margin:25px auto;
border-radius:20px;
width:85%;
backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
transition:0.3s;
}

.section:hover{
transform:translateY(-5px);
}

/* BUTTONS */

button{
background:linear-gradient(45deg,#00f2fe);
border:none;
color:Navy;
padding:12px 28px;
margin:10px;
font-family:Ink Free;
font-size:16px;
border-radius:30px;
cursor:pointer;
transition:0.3s;
box-shadow:0 5px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

button:hover{
transform:scale(1.05);
background:linear-gradient(45deg,#00c6ff,#0072ff);
}

/* MEDIA */

.media{
display:flex;
justify-content:center;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:15px;
}

.media img, video{
width:200px;
height:130px;
border-radius:15px;
object-fit:cover;
box-shadow:0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
cursor:pointer;
transition:.4s;
}

.media img:hover{
transform:scale(1.1);
}

/* FOOTER NAVIGATION */

.page-footer{
margin-top:40px;
padding:15px;
background:#151030;
border-top:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}

/* FLOATING EFFECT */

.floating{
animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float{
0%{transform:translateY(0);}
50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}
100%{transform:translateY(0);}
}

/* LIGHTBOX */

.lightbox{
position:fixed;
top:0;
left:0;
width:100%;
height:100%;
background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
display:none;
align-items:center;
justify-content:center;
z-index:999;
}

.lightbox img{
max-width:80%;
max-height:80%;
border-radius:15px;
}

/* HOME PAGE SPECIFIC STYLES */
.home-text {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  max-width: 400px;
}

.home-buttons {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

</style>
</head>

      <h2>I <3 FAIRNESS!</h2>
      <p><i>"And let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up."</i> - Galatians 6:9</p>
      
      <div class="home-buttons">
        <button onclick="showPage('personal')">My Personal Space</button>

<div id="personal" class="page">
<h1>My Personal Space</h1>
<div class="section">
<h2>Personal Details</h2>
<p>good day! my first name is Juan Laurenz but i usually go by renz. i was born on the 7th of July in the year 2011. currently, i am 14 years of age and crazily enjoying my teenage years with friends and family. some of my hobbies include watching TV—specifically animes and k-dramas, being on my phone, and participating in sports—such as basketball and volleyball. fun fact about me is that i love eatinggggg!</p>

<h2>My Circle of Friends</h2>
<p>throughout my stay at LPSci, it has come to my attention that real friends are gold. they're rare, they're worthy, and they're precious. these are my friends whom made going to school exciting. i would say that if i had no friends, i'd be studying all day and getting high scores but thanks to these weirdos—i actually enjoy studying but more on the fun side.</p>

<h3>Lesson 1: Demand</h3>
<p>Ang demand ay tumutukoy sa kakayahan at kagustuhan ng mamimili na bumili ng produkto sa isang takdang presyo. Formula: Demand = KAGUSTUHAN + KAKAYAHAN. Batas ng Demand: Kapag tumaas ang presyo, bumababa ang dami ng demand.</p>

<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
<img id="lightbox-img">
</div>

<script>
/* PAGE NAVIGATION */
function showPage(id){
    document.querySelectorAll(".page").forEach(p=>p.classList.remove("active"));
    document.getElementById(id).classList.add("active");
    window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

/* LIGHTBOX LOGIC */
document.querySelectorAll('.media img').forEach(img => {
    img.onclick = () => {
        const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
        const lbImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
        lbImg.src = img.src;
        lb.style.display = 'flex';
    };
});

document.getElementById('lightbox').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').style.display = 'none';
};
</script>

</body>
</html>
